title: Stop Prompting Claude. Use Karpathy's Method Instead.
summary: Austin Marchese presents Andrej Karpathy's three-layer method for using Claude to accelerate development, arguing it is superior to standard prompting approaches. The method is framed as enabling 10x faster building with Claude and Claude Code.
writeup: Austin Marchese walks through Andrej Karpathy's three-layer method for working with Claude and Claude Code, positioning it as an alternative to standard prompting. The video's claim is that this structured approach speeds up building rather than relying on one-off prompts. The takeaway is the three-layer framing itself, presented as the mechanism behind faster development with Claude.
